title: Blue Shoes.
content:
Little Blue Shoes
    Mustn't go
    Very far alone, you know
    Else she'll fall down,
    Or, lose her way;
    Fancy--what
    Would mamma say?
    Better put her little hand
    Under sister's wise command.
    When she's a little older grown
    Blue Shoes may go quite alone.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Kate Greenaway delivers a powerful performance in "Blue Shoes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
